newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Zhaowei completed an A+H dual listing (02692.HK) on March 9, 2026, and entered embodied AI with 17-DOF dexterous hands (Nov 2025) and the DM17/LM06 series (mid-2025) - all prior to the refresh window. The -13% move since June 9 (-23.9% YTD) is price/sentiment, not a disclosed fundamental event; commentary continues to flag near-term growth softness.

verdicts.rankRationale: Humanoid-stack lens: precision-motion/gearbox name with dexterous-hand optionality and modest cap. No new fundamental catalyst since June 9; the -13% drop is sentiment, not news, and growth-softness flags persist. Don't up-rank on the dip alone. Hold.
verdicts.bull: Cleaner setup than Japan reducer leaders: modest cap, down YTD; precision gearbox + dexterous-hand second growth curve into humanoids.
verdicts.neutral: Embodied-AI revenue still nascent; core business growth has stumbled, so the robot story is mostly optionality.
verdicts.bear: Sharp drawdown and weak near-term growth suggest the humanoid premium is unwinding; execution unproven at scale.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Humanoid dexterous-hand / actuator module order wins
verdicts.primaryRisk: Core-business growth deceleration; humanoid optionality re-rating lower
